zh.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可
zh.Gilsland, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德
zh.Lanercost, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德萊納爾可斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Maxwell於大約1335年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可時，她的父親John Maxwell26歲，母親Christian Erskine21歲。她於1355年6月與Hugh Dacre在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1369年1月1日在她的家鄉享年35歲，埋葬在英國波藍德萊納爾可斯特。

zh-hans.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可
zh-hans.Gilsland, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Maxwell于大约1335年出生在苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可时，她的父亲John Maxwell26岁，母亲Christian Erskine21岁。她于1355年6月与Hugh Dacre在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1369年1月1日在她的家乡享年35岁，埋葬在英国波藍德萊納爾可斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Maxwell was born about 1335, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, John Maxwell, was 26 and her mother, Christian Erskine, was 21. She married Hugh Dacre in June 1355, in Gilsland, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1 January 1369, in her hometown, at the age of 35, and was buried in Lanercost, Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Maxwell est née environ 1335, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, John Maxwell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Christian Erskine, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Dacre en juin 1355, à Gilsland, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1 janvier 1369, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Lanercost, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Maxwell um 1335 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Maxwell 26 und ihre Mutter Christian Erskine 21. Sie hat im Juni 1355 in Gilsland, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Hugh Dacre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1. Januar 1369 im Alter von 35 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Lanercost, Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Maxwell è nata il circa 1335 nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Maxwell, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Christian Erskine, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Dacre nel giugno 1355, nel Gilsland, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1 gennaio 1369, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Lanercost, Cumberland, England.

ja.Gilsland, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドギルスランド
ja.Liddesdale, Roxburghshire, Scotland: スコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイア
ja.Lanercost, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドランエルコスト

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Maxwellが約1335年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで生まれた時，父John Maxwellは26歳，母Christian Erskineは21歳であった。1355年6月にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドギルスランドでHugh Dacreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1369年1月1日に故郷で35歳で死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドランエルコストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Maxwell(이)가 대략 1335년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Maxwell(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Erskine(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1355년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 길슬랜드에서 Hugh Dacre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1369년 1월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 쿠벌랜드 랜르코스트에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1335–about 1 January 1369: tany ho any amin'ny 1335–tany ho any amin'ny 1 janoary 1369

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Maxwell nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Maxwell, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Christian Erskine, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Dacre em junho de 1355, em Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1 de janeiro de 1369, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Maxwell родилась около 1335 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Maxwell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Erskine, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Dacre июнь 1355 г. в местности джилсланд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1 января 1369 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности ланиркост, кумбирланд, Англия.

sm.about 1335–about 1 January 1369: e tusa o le 1335–e tusa o le 1 Ianuari 1369

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Maxwell nació aproximadamente 1335, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, John Maxwell, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Christian Erskine, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Hugh Dacre en junio de 1355, en Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1 de enero de 1369, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra.
